title: Income you must declare
description: Work out which income you need to declare in your tax return, such as employment, government and investment income.
keywords: Income, income to declare, salary, wages, assessable income, taxable, taxable income, exempt, exempt income, employment income, pensions, annuity, centrelink, dividends, rent, interest, capital gain, declare, assessable

child_links.title: Employment income
child_links.description: Income from working such as wages, allowances, lump sum payments, cash and tips, reportable fringe benefits and super.

child_links.title: Foreign and worldwide income
child_links.description: Check if you need to declare foreign income and pay tax, the tax you pay depends on your residency for tax purposes.

child_links.title: Government payments and allowances
child_links.description: When to declare taxable and tax-free government payments, pensions and allowances in your tax return.

child_links.title: Investment income
child_links.description: Work out which investment income you must declare, such as interest, dividends, rental income or other capital gains.

child_links.title: Superannuation pensions and annuities
child_links.description: Find out about declaring income in your tax return from superannuation pensions or annuities.

child_links.title: Business, partnership and trust income
child_links.description: How to declare income you earn as a sole trader, as a partner in a partnership or from a trust.

child_links.title: Compensation and insurance payments
child_links.description: Check if you need to declare and pay tax on compensation and insurance payments, including settlements.

child_links.title: Scholarships prizes and awards
child_links.description: What to declare in your tax return and tax you pay on scholarships, prizes and awards.

child_links.title: Your income if you are under 18 years old
child_links.description: If you're under 18 years old (a minor), special rules apply to income you earn and you may pay tax at a higher rate.

child_links.title: Taxable assessable and exempt income
child_links.description: Income you receive may be taxable, assessable, exempt, or non-assessable non-exempt – find out if you need to report it.

child_links.title: Amounts you do not include as income
child_links.description: Amounts that you earn or receive that you don't need to declare as income.

child_links.title: Lump sum payment in arrears
child_links.description: Check if you qualify to pay less tax, Medicare levy and Medicare levy surcharge on a lump sum payment in arrears.

source_title: Income you must declare | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: Work out which income you need to declare in your tax return, such as employment, government and investment income.
